app.signInDesc: Zaloguj się przez Google, aby zarządzać priorytetami filarów, wpływem person i planowaniem backlogu B2B2C.
app.magicLinkError: Nie udało się wysłać linku. Spróbuj ponownie.
app.magicLinkUnavailable: Logowanie e-mailem nie jest włączone na tym serwerze.
app.loginFailed: Logowanie nie powiodło się. Spróbuj ponownie lub skontaktuj się z pomocą techniczną.
app.pendingDesc: Administrator musi zatwierdzić dostęp, zanim będziesz mógł korzystać z aplikacji. Zalogujesz się po aktualizacji roli.
app.pendingWorkspaceRegLine: {{team}} (/t/{{slug}}) — oczekuje na zatwierdzenie nowej przestrzeni przez Tymio.
app.pendingWorkspaceRegFootnote: To jest niezależne od statusu konta powyżej: nowe zespoły weryfikuje Tymio, a nie ta przestrzeń.
app.noNavViewsAvailable: Brak widoków nawigacji dla Twojego konta. Poproś superadministratora, aby włączył co najmniej jeden widok: Admin → Ustawienia → Widoki nawigacji.

agentSetup.title: Connecting a Coding Agent
agentSetup.subtitle: Give your AI agent secure access to your Tymio workspace.
agentSetup.howToConnect: How to connect your MCP client (Cursor, Claude Code, OpenClaw, etc.)
agentSetup.intro: Tymio uses the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to let your AI agent securely read and write data in your workspace. We use a Zero-Trust OAuth flow, which means you never have to copy or paste any API keys.
agentSetup.step4Desc: Your agent will open a browser window. Log in to Tymio and authorize the connection. The browser will automatically redirect back to your agent, establishing a secure, stable connection.
agentSetup.securityDesc: Your agent uses Refresh Token Rotation (RTR) and PKCE. Every time the agent reconnects, its token is rotated. If a token is ever intercepted and reused, the entire connection is instantly revoked to protect your workspace.

initiative.title: Title
initiative.notesDesignHint: Use for section-level design links (e.g. primary Figma section), design status, and related frames — keep the main description product-facing.
initiative.unsavedMsg: You have unsaved changes. What would you like to do?
initiative.personaRadarNoPersonas: No personas defined — add personas in Admin to use the radar.
initiative.personaRadarEmpty: No persona impact scores yet — set impact in the initiative detail panel.
initiative.timelineHint: Configure start/target/milestone dates above and save.

raci.title: RACI Matrix
raci.footer: {{count}} initiatives · Rows highlighted in amber have no Accountable assigned.

gantt.title: Gantt Timeline
gantt.subtitle: {{count}} initiative(s) with dates
gantt.prolongedNote: Initiatives are for a fixed period. Work continuing into the next period should be added as a new follow-up initiative with new goals.
gantt.timelineExtended: Timeline extended — work continues beyond the original window.
gantt.empty: No initiatives with start and target dates to display.

accounts.title: Partners
accounts.description: Not a CRM — tracks partner dependencies on products, assets, initiatives and requirements only.
accounts.selectAccount: Select a partner to see details

demands.title: Demands
demands.description: Maps demands from partners and integrations to initiatives — the bridge between external requests and your product roadmap.

partners.title: Integrations
partners.description: Not an integration management tool — tracks integration-driven feature demands and their link to initiatives.
partners.selectPartner: Select an integration to see details

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.empty: No campaigns found. Create one to get started.

productTree.expandedWhileQuickFilter: Tree is expanded for the quick filter. Clear the filter to fold rows manually.
productTree.empty: No products or systems found. Create one to get started.

executionBoard.title: Execution board
executionBoard.noBoard: No execution board yet. Create one in board settings.
executionBoard.deleteColumnConfirm: Delete column "{{name}}"? Requirements in this column become unassigned.
executionBoard.clearFiltersToReorder: Clear search and filters to drag cards vertically and reorder within columns.

admin.emailLocked: Email is locked after Google login
admin.aliasesDesc: Login aliases (any of these emails can be used to log in):
admin.deleteUserConfirm: Delete user "{{name}}"? Their email(s) will be freed and can be added to another account (merge).
admin.roleLockedSelf: You cannot change your own role here.
admin.roleLockedSuperAdmin: Only a super administrator (SUPER_ADMIN) can change roles for other super administrators. Sign in with a SUPER_ADMIN account or ask one to make the change.
admin.emailUsedByOther: This email is already used by "{{name}}". Delete that user above, then add this email here as an alias (merge).

navViews.desc: Turn a view off to remove it from the sidebar and block direct URLs for everyone except super admins. At least one view must stay on.
navViews.keepOne: At least one view must remain visible.

admin.personaCategoryDesc: Category determines grouping in the Buyer x User chart. BUYER = horizontal axis, USER = vertical axis, NONE = excluded from chart.
admin.deleteDomain: Delete this pillar? Initiatives using it will lose their pillar.
admin.deletePersona: Delete this persona? Impact data using it will be removed.
admin.exportDesc: Download application data as a JSON file.
admin.importDesc: Upload a previously exported JSON file.
admin.mergeDesc: Add new & update existing records by name. Existing data is preserved.
admin.replaceDesc: Delete all existing data and import from scratch.
admin.replaceWarning: This will permanently delete all existing data and replace it. This action cannot be undone.
admin.mergeWarning: This will merge the file contents into your existing data. Matching records (by name/title) will be updated.
admin.clearWarning: This will permanently delete everything except your user account.
admin.ontology.desc: Product capabilities, bindings to routes/MCP/models, and the compiled agent brief. Use “Refresh defaults” to seed from the codebase manifest; edit semantics here.
admin.ontology.title: Title
admin.ontology.tenantGuideBindingsBody:
Use backlog fields for row-level links: initiative notes, feature description, requirement external reference. Add FIGMA_NODE or DESIGN_REF here when you want the same design anchor on the capability itself so it appears in the compiled agent brief next to routes and MCP tools. After edits, use “Compile & store briefs” above.

Full tenant playbook: docs/DESIGN_REFERENCES.md in the repository.
admin.ontology.tenantGuideBindingsExamples:
FIGMA_NODE — key: fileKey:1:234 (from figma.com/design/<fileKey>/… ; take node-id from the URL and replace hyphens with colons).
DESIGN_REF — key: full https://… URL or a short stable id your team documents.
admin.notificationRulesDesc: Global rules: who gets notified when events happen.
admin.noRules: No notification rules. Add one to notify users on events.
admin.exportFailed: Export failed. Check the console for details.
admin.importFailed: Import failed. Transaction was rolled back. No data was changed.
admin.clearFailed: Clear failed. Transaction was rolled back.

featureDetail.descriptionHint: Summary plus primary exact design link (e.g. Figma frame). Name ontology themes (templates, flows, controls) in text, not only URLs.
featureDetail.acceptanceCriteriaHint: Keep testable / behavioral criteria here — not a link dump.

requirementDetail.descriptionHint: Use for extra UI states, clarifications, or secondary links. Put one primary exact node in external reference.
requirementDetail.externalRefHint: Single primary link (e.g. exact Figma node for this UI state). Optional until you edit.

labels.title: Labels
labels.featureHint: Use labels like mvp, launch-blocker, or tech-debt even when the feature has no requirements yet.
labels.requirementHint: Use labels for slices such as mvp, qa, migration, or compliance.

notificationSubscriptions.title: My notification subscriptions
notificationSubscriptions.empty: You have no subscriptions. Use "Notify me" on an initiative or pillar to subscribe.

tenant.selectWorkspaceDesc: You have access to multiple workspaces. Choose one to continue.
tenant.noWorkspacesDesc: You are not a member of any workspace yet. Contact an administrator to get access.
tenant.pendingRegsApprovedNoTenant: {{team}} (/t/{{slug}}) — approved; if you still cannot access it, contact support.
tenant.slugRegBannerPending: You opened /t/{{slug}} ({{team}}). That workspace is not available yet — your registration is still waiting for approval from Tymio.
tenant.slugRegBannerApprovedNoAccess: You opened /t/{{slug}} ({{team}}). The workspace was approved but your account is not a member yet. Try again after refreshing, or contact support if this continues.
tenant.entryLinkHelp: Link icon: copy the URL for that workspace’s /t/… sign-in page.
tenant.switcherApplicationsHelp: Workspaces you applied for; open one to see status or use the link icon to copy its /t/… sign-in URL.
tenant.requestNewWorkspaceIntro: Nasz zespół rozpatrzy Twoją prośbę. Po zatwierdzeniu powiadomimy Cię e-mailem.
tenant.requestNewWorkspaceSlugInvalid: Slug w URL: co najmniej 2 znaki — tylko małe litery, cyfry i myślniki.

landing.title: Witamy w Tymio
landing.subtitle: Zarządzanie produktem i inicjatywami dla zespołów
landing.signInDesc: Masz już konto? Zaloguj się, aby kontynuować.
landing.registerDesc: Utwórz nową przestrzeń roboczą dla swojej organizacji.

register.title: Zarejestruj swój zespół
register.subtitle: Wypełnij poniższe pola, aby złożyć wniosek o nową przestrzeń. Nasz zespół rozpatrzy i zatwierdzi prośbę.
register.slugHelp: Tylko małe litery, cyfry i myślniki.
register.successDesc: Otrzymaliśmy zgłoszenie. Powiadomimy Cię na {{email}} po zatwierdzeniu.
register.errorSlugTaken: Ten slug jest już zajęty. Wybierz inny.
register.errorGeneric: Coś poszło nie tak. Spróbuj ponownie.

workspaceSettings.title: Ustawienia przestrzeni roboczej
workspaceSettings.intro: Te opcje dotyczą wszystkich członków tej przestrzeni.
workspaceSettings.languagesDesc: Wybierz języki widoczne w nagłówku aplikacji. Każda osoba nadal wybiera własny język spośród włączonych opcji.
workspaceSettings.noAccess: Tylko właściciele i administratorzy przestrzeni mogą zmieniać te ustawienia.
workspaceSettings.minOne: Pozostaw co najmniej jeden włączony język.
workspaceSettings.errorSave: Nie udało się zapisać. Spróbuj ponownie.

tenantAdmin.title: Tenant Management
tenantAdmin.confirmApprove: This will create the workspace, provision it, and send access to the contact. Continue?
tenantAdmin.confirmReject: Are you sure you want to reject this request?
tenantAdmin.confirmSuspend: Are you sure you want to suspend this workspace?
tenantAdmin.confirmRemoveMember: Are you sure you want to remove this member?

tenantSlug.signInTo: Zaloguj się, aby uzyskać dostęp do {{name}}.
tenantSlug.notFoundDesc: Szukana przestrzeń nie istnieje lub nie jest już dostępna.
tenantSlug.registrationPendingBody: Wysłano wniosek o rejestrację {{team}} (/t/{{slug}}). Czeka na zatwierdzenie przez Tymio, zanim ten adres zadziała.
tenantSlug.registrationPendingFootnote: Po zalogowaniu będziemy tu przypominać do momentu zatwierdzenia przestrzeni.
tenantSlug.registrationRejectedBody: Wniosek o utworzenie {{team}} pod adresem /t/{{slug}} nie został zatwierdzony.
tenantSlug.provisioningBody: {{team}} (/t/{{slug}}) jest nadal uruchamiana. Ta strona zadziała, gdy przestrzeń będzie aktywna.
tenantSlug.membershipPendingTitle: Nie jesteś jeszcze w tej przestrzeni
tenantSlug.membershipPendingLead: Jesteś zalogowany jako <1>{{email}}</1>. To nie to samo co członkostwo w przestrzeni poniżej.
tenantSlug.membershipPendingBody: Ta przestrzeń jest aktywna, ale Twoje konto nie zostało do niej dodane. Poproś administratora lub właściciela o zaproszenie albo dodanie jako członka. Do tego czasu pozostaniesz w przestrzeni, z której już korzystasz (np. hub Tymio).
tenantSlug.membershipPendingAlsoPlatform: Twoje konto platformowe również oczekuje na zatwierdzenie. Nawet po dodaniu do tej przestrzeni rola może wymagać aktywacji przez Tymio, zanim aplikacja w pełni się otworzy.
